cases.title: ErrorMapper maps every catalog errorCode to Vietnamese message per error-handling §4
preconditions: ErrorMapper module wired to @wecheck/domain message catalog with locale vi-VN default
Error code catalog from error-handling §4.1–§4.6 enumerated in test fixture
No English fallback strings configured for production locale
steps: For each errorCode in authentication catalog (Unauthenticated, SessionExpired, InvalidCredentials, AccountDeactivated), invoke ErrorMapper.map and assert message is non-empty Vietnamese text matching catalog defaults
For each errorCode in authorization catalog (Forbidden, NotEnrolled, SessionNotActive, EditWindowExpired), assert Vietnamese message returned
For each check-in outcome (ExpiredQr, OutOfRadius, DuplicateCheckIn, GpsDisabled, SpoofSuspected, TokenNotFound, TokenAlreadyUsed), assert Vietnamese message per §4.4
For operational codes (RateLimitExceeded, InternalError, ServiceUnavailable), assert Vietnamese message per §4.6
For bootstrap and preflight codes (SetupAlreadyComplete, SessionMismatch, TokenNotFound), assert Vietnamese message per §2.4 and §4.4
Assert no mapped message equals its English errorCode string or contains only ASCII technical identifiers
cases.expected: NFR-17 module boundary: ErrorMapper resolves 100% of catalog errorCodes to Vietnamese user-facing messages; stable English errorCode preserved separately per validation-rules localization rule

cases.title: @wecheck/domain message catalog vi-VN keys complete with no missing or English-only entries
preconditions: Message catalog package @wecheck/domain exported with default locale vi-VN per ui-ux-foundation §3
Catalog key inventory includes auth, bootstrap/setup, check-in outcomes, session lifecycle, reports, admin, and validation namespaces
Production quality bar §2 localization dimension requires copy audit against message keys
steps: Enumerate all user-facing message keys from catalog export
For each key, resolve value with locale vi-VN and assert value is non-empty
Assert each value contains Vietnamese diacritics or common Vietnamese words (e.g. không, vui lòng, buổi học, điểm danh)
Flag any key whose value is identical to English placeholder or matches /^[A-Za-z0-9_\s.-]+$/ without Vietnamese characters
Compute coverage rate and assert equals 100% of user-facing keys
cases.expected: NFR-17 100% target: every user-facing message key resolves to Vietnamese copy; no English-only or stub strings in vi-VN catalog per production-ui-quality-bar §2

cases.title: Session open transition failure returns RoomGpsRequired with Vietnamese validation message
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Draft session missing room latitude/longitude
SessionStateGuard and ErrorMapper integrated with session module
Authenticated Instructor assigned to session
steps: Invoke SessionService.open(sessionId) for Draft session without valid room GPS
Assert domain exception maps to errorCode RoomGpsRequired
Assert ErrorMapper message equals Vui lòng cấu hình tọa độ GPS phòng học trước khi mở buổi per error-handling §4.3
Query sessions table and confirm status remains Draft
cases.expected: NFR-17 state-transition failure path: blocked Draft→Active transition surfaces Vietnamese RoomGpsRequired message; beforeState Draft, afterState Draft unchanged per AC-04b

cases.title: POST /check-in with expired QR token returns 400 ExpiredQr and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Active session with QR token issued at T0
TestClock advanced to T0 + 31 seconds
Authenticated enrolled Student with valid in-radius coordinates
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId, latitude, and longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert message equals Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới per AC-06b and error-handling §4.4
cases.expected: NFR-17 API error envelope: check-in rejection returns Vietnamese ExpiredQr message; English errorCode stable for client logic per BR-03 spot-check

cases.title: POST /check-in without GPS coordinates returns 400 GpsDisabled and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Active session with valid QR token and enrolled authenticated Student
Request body omits latitude and longitude fields
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId only using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome GpsDisabled
Assert message Vui lòng bật GPS và cấp quyền định vị để điểm danh per AC-08c
Assert errorCode field is English GpsDisabled while message is Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 check-in error path: GpsDisabled response message in Vietnamese per BR-12 acceptance matrix spot-check; technical errorCode remains English

cases.title: POST /auth/login with invalid credentials returns 401 InvalidCredentials and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Active student account exists with known email
Incorrect password prepared for login attempt
steps: POST /api/v1/auth/login with valid email and wrong password
Assert HTTP status 401 and errorCode InvalidCredentials
Assert message Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng per error-handling §4.1 and ui-states §3
cases.expected: NFR-17 authentication error: login failure surfaces Vietnamese InvalidCredentials message; no English user-facing text in response body

cases.title: POST /check-in duplicate returns 409 DuplicateCheckIn and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Student already has Present attendance for Active session
Valid unexpired QR token and in-radius coordinates available
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid payload using Student session who already checked in
Assert HTTP status 409 and outcome DuplicateCheckIn
Assert message Bạn đã điểm danh buổi học này rồi per AC-09a and error-handling §4.4
cases.expected: NFR-17 duplicate check-in path: HTTP 409 with Vietnamese DuplicateCheckIn message per business-rules spot-check in NFR-17 verification

cases.title: BR acceptance-matrix spot-check: documented Vietnamese error messages returned for TS-18, TS-24, TS-26, TS-32 scenarios
preconditions: Test fixtures prepared for ExpiredQr (TS-18), GpsDisabled (TS-24), DuplicateCheckIn (TS-26), and export denial (TS-32) per testing-plan §3
API server running with vi-VN default locale
steps: Execute TS-18 expired QR check-in and assert Vietnamese ExpiredQr message per AC-06b
Execute TS-24 GPS disabled check-in and assert Vietnamese GpsDisabled message per AC-08c
Execute TS-26 duplicate check-in and assert Vietnamese DuplicateCheckIn message per AC-09a
Execute TS-32 non-admin CSV export and assert Vietnamese Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Record pass rate across all four spot-checks
cases.expected: NFR-17 verification method satisfied: acceptance-matrix spot-check of BR-documented Vietnamese messages passes for core rejection scenarios mapped in testing-plan §3

cases.title: Instructor POST /reports/export denied with 403 and Vietnamese export-restriction message
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session with valid report filter context
Instructor lacks export permission per BR-09 and roles-permissions
steps: POST /api/v1/reports/export with valid filter body using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Assert no CSV response body returned
cases.expected: NFR-17 RBAC denial: export rejection message localized in Vietnamese; permission error not exposed as raw English Forbidden text

cases.title: Instructor GET unassigned class report denied with 403 and Vietnamese permission message
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned only to class HESD-01
Attendance data exists for unassigned class HESD-02
steps: GET /api/v1/reports/summary?classCode=HESD-02&subjectCode=SWE-101 using Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode Forbidden
Assert message Bạn không có quyền thực hiện thao tác này per error-handling §4.2 and AC-12b
Assert response contains no student or attendance data
cases.expected: NFR-17 authorization denial: unassigned report access blocked with Vietnamese Forbidden message per AC-12b localized permission error

cases.title: API error response message field contains no English-only user guidance; errorCode remains English
preconditions: Representative error responses collected: Unauthenticated, ValidationFailed, OutOfRadius, Forbidden, InternalError
Regex patterns defined for English-only sentences and Vietnamese diacritic detection
steps: Trigger each representative error via API and capture response JSON
Assert errorCode values are stable English identifiers per error-handling §4
Assert message field for each response contains Vietnamese characters or documented Vietnamese phrases
Assert message field does not equal raw stack trace, SQL fragment, or untranslated English sentence like Please log in or Access denied
Assert requestId and technical UUID fields may remain English/ASCII per NFR-17 exception for technical identifiers
cases.expected: NFR-17 boundary: user-facing message field is Vietnamese; English permitted only for errorCode and technical identifiers per specification

cases.title: Successful check-in 200 response success message is Vietnamese while outcome code is English
preconditions: Active session with valid QR token
Authenticated enrolled Student with in-radius coordinates
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid payload using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and outcome Success
Assert message Điểm danh thành công per error-handling §4.4 Success row
Assert outcome field Success is English technical identifier acceptable per NFR-17
cases.expected: NFR-17 success path boundary: Vietnamese confirmation message paired with English outcome identifier; dual-field contract per API design §6.3

cases.title: Login page labels, validation errors, and session-expired toast are Vietnamese
preconditions: Application running with default locale vi-VN
Desktop viewport 1024px for login route /login
Deactivated and invalid-credential test accounts available
steps: Navigate to /login and verify form labels (email, password), submit button, and page heading use Vietnamese copy
Submit invalid credentials and verify alert Email hoặc mật khẩu không đúng per ui-states §3
Submit deactivated account credentials and verify Tài khoản đã bị vô hiệu hóa message
Trigger session-expired redirect and verify toast Phiên đăng nhập đã hết hạn per ui-states §2
Scan visible text for English-only user-facing strings on login form controls
cases.expected: NFR-17 student/instructor auth UI: 100% Vietnamese copy on /login including error and session-expiry states per ui-states §3 and production-ui-quality-bar §4 Not acceptable

cases.title: Student check-in flow preflight, GPS ready state, and success display Vietnamese copy only
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport 375px
Active session with valid token deep link to /check-in
GPS permission grantable in test browser; device simulation enabled in harness per NFR-24
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify validating_token preflight spinner text is Vietnamese and GpsCaptureStep does not mount until preflight 200 per AC-07c and ui-states §4.1
Verify LocationConsentBanner and GPS substates use Vietnamese (e.g. Đang yêu cầu quyền định vị per ui-states §4.2)
When gpsState is ready, verify Vị trí đã sẵn sàng with check icon, no Spinner, aria-busy false, and enabled Xác nhận điểm danh submit per AC-08f
Complete successful check-in and verify outcome panel shows Điểm danh thành công with primary CTA Xong
Verify no English-only labels on scan button, GPS states, submit control, or success confirmation
Assert data-testid attributes may use English errorCode values but visible text remains Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 student check-in UI: preflight gate, GPS ready/success path labels, and outcome in Vietnamese per FR-07, AC-08f, and ui-states §4

cases.title: Check-in outcome panel variants render documented Vietnamese messages per ui-states §4.3
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport

Test harness or API stubs trigger each check-in outcome per ui-states §4.3: Present, ExpiredQr, OutOfRadius, GpsDisabled, DuplicateCheckIn, SpoofSuspected, SessionNotActive, NotEnrolled, and network error
Active session context prepared per outcome
steps: Trigger Present outcome and verify success message with CTA Xong in Vietnamese
Trigger ExpiredQr outcome and verify message and CTA Quét lại in Vietnamese
Trigger OutOfRadius outcome and verify warning copy with CTA Thử lại
Trigger GpsDisabled outcome and verify danger copy with CTA Hướng dẫn cấp quyền per AC-08c
Trigger DuplicateCheckIn and verify info variant with CTA Xem lịch sử per AC-09a message
Trigger SpoofSuspected and verify danger copy with CTA Liên hệ giảng viên per error-handling §4.4
Trigger SessionNotActive and verify warning copy with CTA Đóng
Trigger NotEnrolled and verify danger copy with CTA Đóng per error-handling §4.2
Simulate network error and verify danger copy Không có kết nối mạng with CTA Thử lại per ui-states §4.3 and error-handling §7
Confirm each variant icon and heading text is Vietnamese; no raw API errorCode shown to user
cases.expected: NFR-17 outcome coverage: all CheckInOutcomePanel variants including Present, NotEnrolled, and network error display Vietnamese messages and CTAs per ui-states §4.3 catalog; distinct UI treatment per outcome

cases.title: Instructor session list, detail tabs, and lifecycle confirm dialogs use Vietnamese copy
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Draft and Active sessions in database
Desktop viewport 1280px
Instructor navigates to /sessions and /sessions/:sessionId
steps: Verify session list empty state Chưa có buổi học and grouped sections Đang diễn ra / Nháp / Đã kết thúc per ui-states §6
Open session detail and verify tab labels QR, Theo dõi, Danh sách, Cài đặt in Vietnamese
On Draft session QR tab, verify session-not-active illustration Buổi học chưa mở per ui-states §7.2
Click Mở buổi học and verify confirm dialog Xác nhận mở buổi học?
On QR tab with Active session, verify countdown label and fullscreen CTA in Vietnamese
Click Đóng buổi học and verify confirm dialog Kết thúc điểm danh? per ui-states §7.5
On Draft session, click Hủy buổi học and verify confirm dialog Hủy buổi học này? in Vietnamese per ui-states §7.5
On monitor tab after close, verify banner Buổi học đã kết thúc in Vietnamese
On closed session roster tab, verify edit-locked tooltip Chỉ phòng đào tạo có thể chỉnh sửa sau 24 giờ per ui-states §7.4
cases.expected: NFR-17 instructor UI: session management surfaces 100% Vietnamese labels, badges, confirm dialogs, and tooltips per ui-states §6–§7

cases.title: Admin roster import and CSV export UI states display Vietnamese copy
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Valid and invalid CSV fixtures for import
Report data available for export
steps: Navigate to /admin/rosters/import and verify drop zone, parsing spinner Đang đọc tệp…, and completion summary Đã nhập {n} dòng; {m} dòng lỗi per ui-states §11
Upload malformed CSV and verify preview error Tệp không đúng định dạng with required columns listed in Vietnamese
Navigate to /admin/export and verify filter labels, Xuất CSV button, and success toast Đã tải xuống per ui-states §12
Verify export failure state shows Xuất thất bại with Thử lại CTA in Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 admin UI: roster import and CSV export workflows use Vietnamese labels, progress text, summaries, and error states per ui-states §11–§12

cases.title: Student attendance history empty, populated, and pagination states use Vietnamese copy
preconditions: Authenticated Student account
Student with zero history and student with paginated history fixtures
Mobile viewport 375px
steps: Navigate to /history with empty history and verify EmptyState Chưa có buổi học nào per ui-states §5
Load populated history and verify StatusBadge labels, date formatting vi-VN locale, and Tải thêm button
Reach end of list and verify Đã hiển thị tất cả message
Simulate fetch error and verify Alert with Thử lại CTA in Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 student history UI: empty, list, pagination, and error states fully localized per ui-states §5 and FR-14

cases.title: ForbiddenPage and permission-denied inline alerts display Vietnamese guidance
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor without access to requested report or export route
Application ForbiddenPage component at /forbidden or inline denial on /reports and /admin/export
steps: Navigate to unassigned class report as Instructor and verify ForbiddenPage or inline permission alert in Vietnamese
Navigate to admin export route as Instructor and verify denial message Chỉ phòng đào tạo mới có quyền xuất dữ liệu per AC-13b
Verify no English-only Access denied or You do not have permission text visible
Verify navigation CTAs (return home, contact admin) use Vietnamese labels
cases.expected: NFR-17 permission-denied UI: ForbiddenPage and inline denials show Vietnamese recovery guidance per production-ui-quality-bar §4 and ui-states §9

cases.title: Production routes contain no English user-facing strings; technical IDs and data-testid exempt
preconditions: Crawl list of all shipped MVP routes per ui-states §14 and page-list §9: /setup, /login, /check-in, /history, /sessions, /sessions/new, /sessions/:id, /sessions/:id/qr-present, /reports, /admin, /admin/users, /admin/users/new, /admin/rosters, /admin/rosters/import, /admin/classes/new, /admin/reports, /admin/export, /forbidden
Authenticated fixtures for Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin roles
English-detection heuristic excluding UUIDs, errorCode data-testid values, and institutional IDs
steps: Visit each route with appropriate role fixture and capture visible text content
Flag any visible string matching common English UI phrases (Login, Submit, Error, Loading, Cancel, Export, Save) not present in Vietnamese catalog
Assert student ID, class code, and errorCode data-testid attributes are permitted English technical identifiers
Assert zero flagged English-only user-facing strings across all crawled routes
Document any stub or filler text as NFR-17 violation per production-ui-quality-bar §4 Not acceptable
cases.expected: NFR-17 100% target enforced: no English user-facing copy on production paths; technical identifiers and developer test hooks exempt per specification

cases.title: Flow A workshop path surfaces only Vietnamese user messages from login through CSV export confirmation
preconditions: Flow A setup: roster seeded, instructor opened Active session, QR token available per testing-plan §6 Flow A
Student, Instructor, and TrainingOfficeAdmin accounts with vi-VN default locale
API responses captured at each user-visible step
steps: Student completes login and check-in; capture success message Điểm danh thành công
Instructor views attendance monitor; verify Present/Pending/Absent count labels in Vietnamese
Instructor closes session; verify confirm dialog and post-close banner Buổi học đã kết thúc in Vietnamese
Admin exports CSV; verify progress and download confirmation toast Đã tải xuống in Vietnamese
Review all captured user-visible strings in Flow A and assert none are English-only
cases.expected: NFR-17 end-to-end localization: Flow A happy path exposes Vietnamese copy at every student and instructor touchpoint; no English leakage in labels, toasts, or confirmations

cases.title: Reports filter, empty, and permission-denied states display Vietnamese copy
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor assigned to class HESD-01
Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin with report data in date range
Desktop viewport 1280px
steps: Navigate to /reports as Instructor and verify initial filter prompt Chọn bộ lọc và nhấn Áp dụng per ui-states §9
Apply filters with no results and verify empty state Không có dữ liệu trong khoảng thời gian đã chọn
Navigate to unassigned class report and verify ForbiddenPage or permission-denied copy in Vietnamese per AC-12b
Navigate to /admin/reports as TrainingOfficeAdmin and verify filter labels, summary cards, and table column headers in Vietnamese
Simulate fetch error and verify Alert with Thử lại CTA in Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 reports UI: instructor and admin report surfaces use Vietnamese for filters, empty states, errors, and permission denial per ui-states §9

cases.title: QR fullscreen presenter route displays Vietnamese countdown and session-end overlay
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with Active session
Desktop viewport 1280×720 for projector simulation
Session can be closed during test
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:id/qr-present from session detail QR tab
Verify countdown label and minimal chrome text in Vietnamese per ui-states §13
Wait for token refresh and verify cross-fade without English-only status text
Close session while fullscreen is open and verify overlay Buổi học đã kết thúc in Vietnamese
Press Esc or click Thoát and verify return navigation labels remain Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 projector QR UI: fullscreen presenter route uses Vietnamese for countdown, session-end overlay, and exit control per ui-states §13 and NFR-20 readability bar

cases.title: POST /check-in outside radius returns 400 OutOfRadius and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QR token
Authenticated enrolled Student
Coordinates outside configured session radius prepared
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with valid tokenId and out-of-radius latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400 and outcome OutOfRadius
Assert errorCode OutOfRadius is English technical identifier
Assert message contains Vietnamese guidance per error-handling §4.4 OutOfRadius row and AC-08b
cases.expected: NFR-17 radius rejection path: OutOfRadius API response surfaces Vietnamese user message with stable English errorCode per BR-02 spot-check

cases.title: GET check-in preflight for not-enrolled student returns 403 NotEnrolled and Vietnamese message
preconditions: Active session with valid unexpired QR token
Authenticated Student not enrolled in session class-subject
API server running with vi-VN default locale
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using non-enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert message equals Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này per AC-07b, AC-07e, and error-handling §4.2
Assert errorCode field is English NotEnrolled while message is Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 preflight enrollment denial: NotEnrolled response surfaces documented Vietnamese message before GPS step per AC-07e and BR acceptance-matrix spot-check

cases.title: Bootstrap /setup form labels, validation errors, and success redirect use Vietnamese copy
preconditions: Fresh deployment with User.count = 0 and needsSetup true
Desktop viewport 1024px
Valid and invalid bootstrap form fixtures prepared
steps: Navigate to /setup and verify page heading, field labels (institutional ID, name, email, password), and submit button use Vietnamese copy
Submit with password shorter than 8 characters and verify field error Mật khẩu phải có ít nhất 8 ký tự per error-handling §4.3
Submit valid bootstrap form and verify success navigation to /admin hub with Vietnamese hub card labels
Scan visible text on /setup for English-only user-facing strings (Login, Submit, Setup, Error)
Assert institutional ID and email input placeholders or hints remain Vietnamese per production-ui-quality-bar §4
cases.expected: NFR-17 bootstrap UI: /setup first-admin form and validation errors fully localized in Vietnamese per AC-17 and ui-states bootstrap route in page-list §2.0

cases.title: Role home hubs display Vietnamese workflow card labels and nav chrome copy
preconditions: Bootstrap complete with TrainingOfficeAdmin, Instructor (report:read), and Student accounts
Desktop viewport 1280px for admin/instructor; mobile 375px for student hub if applicable
steps: Log in as TrainingOfficeAdmin and navigate to /admin; verify RoleHomeHub card titles and descriptions are Vietnamese per AC-18c
Log in as Instructor and navigate to /sessions; verify hub section shows Tạo buổi học mới and Báo cáo links in Vietnamese per AC-18d
Log in as Student and verify role home hub workflow cards use Vietnamese labels with no English-only nav text
Inspect sidebar and bottom nav labels for each role and assert zero English-only user-facing chrome strings
Assert technical route segments and data-testid values may remain English while visible labels are Vietnamese
cases.expected: NFR-17 role hub localization: admin, instructor, and student home hubs expose Vietnamese workflow guidance per AC-18, FR-18, and production-ui-quality-bar §3 role home next actions
